title: Up 9% In A Month, Will Intuitive Surgical Stock Continue To See Higher Levels?
text: The stock price of Intuitive Surgical has seen a 9% rise in a month, outperforming the broader indices, with the S&P500 down around 2%. Last month the company reported an upbeat Q4, but ISRG stock saw a 10% fall in a week following its earnings release, primarily due to its Q1 outlook.
